text: Got? Got? Good job, honey. Can you find the word back? Back? Good job, honey! Good job! Can you this is a hard one? Can you find the word hungry? Or does it say hungry? Good job, Mormon! That's fantastic! Are you all done, honey? You wanna be done? Where does the word... Can you find the word gift? Where's gift? Good job! Where's the word cards? Cards. That's right!
